creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Carlo Strub from comment #7)
> Is this PR still relevant?

Yes, now that we see the additional info from Steven Hartland, I think I understand the issue.

A patch for bsd.ruby.mk and/or post install script to create the symlink if it isn't there in the pkg install case would possibly resolve it. Though I'm not sure we really support the "no default ruby installed" case.
